chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ وَ الْمُبَارِئَةِ وَ نَفَقَتِهِمَا وَ سُكْنَاهُمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – Waiting period of the women divorced by Al-Khul’a, and Al-Mubaraat, and their expenses, and their dwelling

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/242)

parts.text: أَبِي بَصِيرٍعَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اخْتَلَعَتْ مِنْهُ امْرَأَتُهُ أَ يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَخْطُبَ أُخْتَهَا مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّةُ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَدْ بَرِئَتْ عِصْمَتُهَا مِنْهُ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ عَلَيْهَا رَجْعَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about a man whose wife divorced herself by Khul’a from him, is it permissible for him that he proposes to her sister from before she has fulfilled her waiting period?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes, she has disavowed her marriage from him and there is no reversion for him to her’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man whose wife has arranged al- Khul‘: if it is permissible for him to propose marriage to her sister before waiting period because of al-KhuV is complete. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, because she has freed herself from the bonds of his marriage and he does not have the right to go back to her.’”
